summary: Activity Feed Fix Verified - All 13 backend tests PASSED, frontend Activity tab working correctly with contact names, photos, and tags displayed (no 'Unknown' entries for valid contacts). The fix properly handles: (1) per-item ObjectId conversion in master-feed, (2) invalid contact_id validation in tracking endpoint, (3) invalid contact_id validation in log_customer_activity.
critical_code_review_comments: contact_events.py lines 122-149: Per-item ObjectId conversion with try/except now handles invalid IDs gracefully
contact_activity.py lines 67-73: log_customer_activity validates contact_id before storing, returns None for invalid IDs
tracking.py lines 123-128: tracking endpoint validates contact_id using BsonOid before Path 1 processing
Fix correctly handles the 4 known invalid contact_ids (abc123def456, abc456, contact_xyz, test123) and 63 orphaned contacts without crashing

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Activity feed loads correctly with contact names, photos, tags, and event types

seed_data_creation: Created test contact via find-or-create-and-log endpoint during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Feed fix fully verified. Master-feed endpoint now properly resolves contact names and photos by converting contact_ids to ObjectIds individually with error handling. Invalid contact_ids are rejected at creation time (tracking endpoint and log_customer_activity). The DB has 4 invalid contact_ids and 63 orphaned contacts - both are handled gracefully (show 'Unknown' without crashing). Frontend Activity tab shows 100 events with proper contact names like 'Bud', 'Forest Ward', tags like 'vip'/'sold', and photos where available.

features_verified.master_feed_contact_names: PASS - Contact names resolved (not 'Unknown' for valid contacts)
features_verified.master_feed_contact_photos: PASS - Photos included in response where available
features_verified.master_feed_contact_tags: PASS - Tags array present in contact objects
features_verified.tracking_invalid_contact_rejected: PASS - POST /api/tracking/event with invalid contact_id returns tracked=false
features_verified.tracking_valid_contact_works: PASS - POST /api/tracking/event with valid contact_id tracks successfully
features_verified.find_or_create_works: PASS - POST /api/contacts/{user_id}/find-or-create-and-log creates contact and logs event
features_verified.invalid_data_graceful: PASS - Known invalid contact_ids handled without crashing master-feed
features_verified.frontend_activity_loads: PASS - Activity tab shows events with names, photos, tags, timestamps
features_verified.frontend_unknown_count: PASS - 0 'Unknown' entries visible in Activity feed
